query:
SELECT id, nome, status, estabelecimentoId, convenioId, direcao, tipoArquivo, createdAt 
FROM arquivos 
WHERE nome LIKE '%0282629%' OR status = 'erro'
ORDER BY createdAt DESC
LIMIT 10;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2xKWvZvidGuv3Qt.root --database 98MRdVE9Uf2ZRMz25bPSye --execute SELECT id, nome, status, estabelecimentoId, convenioId, direcao, tipoArquivo, createdAt 
FROM arquivos 
WHERE nome LIKE '%0282629%' OR status = 'erro'
ORDER BY createdAt DESC
LIMIT 10;
